product: Dashboard subscriptions, custom calculations, and visualization improvements
tagline: Account level user subscriptions: Dashboard authors can now subscribe account level users to scheduled dashboard updates.
what_it_does: Account level user subscriptions: Dashboard authors can now subscribe account level users to scheduled dashboard updates. Custom calculation references: Custom calculations can now reference custom calculations on dashboard datasets. Cumulative totals on stacked bar charts: Stacked bar charts can now display the cumulative total of values.
why_it_matters: Improved tooltips on combo and dual axis charts: Tooltips are now easier to access when hovering over combo and dual axis charts.

capabilities.title: Include pages: Select which dashboard
capabilities.desc: Include pages: Select which dashboard pages to include as PDF attachments. Pages are attached in the selected order.

capabilities.title: Include data: Select widgets to
capabilities.desc: Include data: Select widgets to include as data attachments and choose an export format (CSV, TSV, or Excel).

key_takeaway: Account level user subscriptions: Dashboard authors can now subscribe account level users to scheduled dashboard updates.
